title: Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa
The Skilled Migrant Category (SMC) Interim Visa lets you stay in New Zealand legally while your Skilled Migrant Category Resident Visa is being processed. Find information about this visa and forms to change the conditions of an SMC interim visa or add one to a new passport.
- Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa information The Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa lets you stay in New Zealand if your current visa expires while we process your Skilled Migrant Category Resident Visa.

## Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa information
The Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa lets you stay in New Zealand if your current visa expires while we process your Skilled Migrant Category Resident Visa.
- Apply for a variation of conditions for a Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa form Use this form to apply to vary your work, visitor or study conditions if you have a Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa.

## Apply for a variation of conditions for a Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa form
Use this form to apply to vary your work, visitor or study conditions if you have a Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa.
- Apply to transfer your Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa to a new passport form Apply to transfer your Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa to your new passport.

## Apply to transfer your Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa to a new passport form
Apply to transfer your Skilled Migrant Category Interim Visa to your new passport.
